$comment: explain: a grounded Q&A flow (no oracle - an explanation has nothing to compile/verify). It searches the knowledge libraries (guidelines, stdlib, patterns, pitfalls, idioms) for the question and writes a concise PROSE answer, citing the authoritative Go docs. This is the conversational/reference path - unlike `go`/`test`, it does NOT emit a `package solution` file. Run: `/flow explain "<question>"` (or `/route "explain ..."`).
summary: Answer a Go question in prose, grounded in the knowledge base (stdlib, Effective Go / Code Review Comments, patterns, pitfalls). A reference/learning path - no code generation.
